Tornado-diagram data from one-at-a-time perturbation

Source: R/sensitivity.R
tornado_data.Rd

Given a baseline scenario and perturbation scenarios, computes the change in the outcome metric for each perturbation relative to the baseline.

Usage

tornado_data(data, baseline, perturbations, outcome = "kia_rate")

Arguments

data

A dynasimR_data object or summary tibble.

baseline

Character. Scenario ID of the baseline.

perturbations

Character vector. Scenario IDs of one-at-a-time perturbations.

outcome

Character. Column name of the outcome to measure. Default "kia_rate".

Value

A tibble suitable for a tornado plot with columns scenario, delta, lo, hi, sorted by absolute delta.

On this page
